content.rendered:
About Us

Lindsey Leist is the owner and operator of Effective Speech, LLC based in the Tampa Bay area of Florida. She graduated from Florida State University with a Bachelor of Arts in Communication Sciences and Disorders in 2008. She then attained her Master of Science in Speech-Language Pathology in 2012 from Nova Southeastern University. Lindsey is licensed in the state of Florida and holds a certificate of Clinical Competence from the American Speech, Language, and Hearing Association (ASHA).

Lindsey has worked in the speech therapy field since 2008. She has experience working in various settings, including private practice, public and private schools, hospitals, and rehabilitation centers. She is dedicated to helping children and their families through improved communication and daily living skills.

Effective Speech, LLC provides private speech and language services to children in the Tampa Bay area of Florida.
